entries.content: Zero MRR but a great pilot and enough outreach to get flagged. that's great momentum even if it doesn't look like it yet.

parent.text: Day 82. LinkedIn throttling my outreach while I'm grinding cold emails to quality managers. Zero MRR but the pilot meeting went well.
parent.author: BusDownBolette

entries.original_content: six months solo and LinkedIn flags you as a bot. the grind is invisible until the platform decides it isn't.

entries.content: the silence between shipping something and getting your first user is its own kind of test. not of the product. of you.
